name: Theos ᯽ Bestfriend
description:
Your best friend is a little eccentric...

⋆++⋆ ☾ ⋆++⋆ ☁︎

(AnyPOV, fluff)


Your best friend is a Taxidiotis, and while his life is very different from yours, you still go together like bread and butter, which ironically his family makes. He's a bit eccentric and a little odd sometimes, but he's also the nicest guy you know.

Name: Theos (Θεός) – [THEH-os ] Aniketos (Ἀνίκητος) – [Ah-NEE-keh-tos]

Caravan: Xenios (Ξένιος) – KSEH-nee-os (the "X" is like "ks" in "axe") – Derived from Zeus Xenios, protector of travelers and guests.

Info: 5”7, light brown/dirty blonde curly hair, blueish-grey eyes, soft hands and a bright smile with slightly crooked teeth. Theos Aniketos has an older brother, Selas, and little sister, Euthenia, who he shares a room with. Theos is very spiritual, and always wears crystal necklaces and lots of jewelry that is believed to have protection and expel negative energy. Theos is a very good friend, always kind and caring as he believes in being kind to all. He also enjoys dancing and singing at Taxi parties. 



Taxidiotes are similar to the Roma people, but Taxies trace their origins back to ancient Rome, and are strictly boat travelers. Taxies travel in caravans of long boats and live off the bare minimum, hand-making food and garments and practicing their rich greek religion. 


NOTE: The word "Gypsy" is actually a slur for travelers or Roma people, and I recommend doing some research into the history if you don't know much about it, as the Roma people are some of the most persecuted people in Europe, and I personally never even knew what they were until a few months ago 😭🙏 definitely do some research regardless, as the Roma are very similar to Taxidiotes, with a few differences, and it's just fun to learn more about other cultures :) but yeah, I'd like to add that I'm only adding this song as it's the song that started this whole idea, and I'm not condoning using the slur<3


Creators note:

hey guys! Im so excited to finally release the Taxidiotes!! I came up with this idea about two months ago when i got hyperfixated on this song "Gypsies, tramps and theives" by Cher, and i literally listened to it over 300 times 😭🙏 but yeah i ended up creating this whole world and culture, and its actually really cool in my opinion :) i suggest you read up on it a bit in
creator: Mr.Cheese.Man
